products.name: Vibration Integration Chambers
products.descriptor: Combined thermal and vibration test chambers (AGREE chambers) for simultaneous environmental and shaker testing

evidence.snippet:
Vibration Integration Chambers
==============================
\-40°C to +180°C | -70°C to +180°C
High Ramp Rate | Integrates with all major Electrodynamic Shaker manufacturers | Motorized movement for armature and slip-table integration.

Vibration Integration Chambers for Combined Environmental and Vibration Testing
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Combined Thermal, Climatic and Vibration Testing for Real-World Reliability Validation. Also known as AGREE chambers, Vibration Integration Environmental Test Chambers, are designed to evaluate product reliability under simultaneous exposure to vibration using an Electrodynamic Shaker and environmental stresses such as temperature extremes and humidity.

products.name: Air Stream Units
products.descriptor: Temperature forcing systems for rapid localized thermal exposure of electronic components without a full chamber

evidence.snippet:
Air Stream Units
----------------
Air Stream Units (ASUs), also known as temperature forcing systems, are specialized thermal test systems used to rapidly expose electronic components to controlled temperature conditions without the need for a full environmental chamber.
